name: Land of Nod Cinnamon Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 10-inch bundt pan.
2. Arrange the frozen rolls in the pan.
3. Sprinkle brown sugar evenly over the rolls.
4. Sprinkle vanilla instant pudding and cinnamon over the brown sugar.
5. If using raisins, sprinkle them on top as well.
6. Pour the melted butter over the entire mixture.
7. Cover the pan with a clean, damp cloth.
8. Let it sit at room temperature until morning.
9. In the morning, preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake for 25 minutes.
11. Allow the buns to cool for 5 minutes before serving on a plate.
The recipe can be customized by adding pecan pieces or omitting raisins, as some people prefer it either way. Enjoy!
